title: corethrogyne filaginifolia var. californica
intro: Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. californica, also known as California bundleflower, is a perennial shrub in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of California bundleflower include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salves and creams for topical applications.
